title: AuditEvent
description: Structured audit event (PRD sec 7, ENGINEERING observability). Never contains document bodies, credentials, or sensitive prompts.

event_type.description: e.g. case.created, policy.evaluated, specialist.completed, packet.composed, review.decided, servicenow.previewed, servicenow.committed.

detail.description: Identifiers, versions, hashes, latency, and error metadata only. No document bodies.
